codex_oauth_pro.proof_boundary: Pre-existing Codex OAuth/Pro subscription usage is not counted against the $500 launch/growth cash envelope and is not an OpenAI API/model-spend allowance.

openai_api_guardrail.proof_boundary: Read-only OpenAI Costs query verified $0.00 current-period API spend; keep target at $0 unless a human approves API usage.

instructions: Fill one artifact_intake_template block per provider proof artifact.
Keep credential files, raw secrets, OAuth refresh tokens, and private keys out of the artifact path.
Use explicit_no_spend_confirmation only when the owner system or account owner confirms no current-period spend.
After attaching proof, rerun the relevant spend snapshot command, then npm run autonomy:budget:live-proof:reconcile, npm run autonomy:budget:live-proof:validate, and npm run autonomy:budget:verify.
Do not treat this template as spend proof until the verifier and source-system evidence agree.

items.closeout_gap: DeepSeek direct usage export and OpenRouter billing if used
items.owner_system: DeepSeek API account and OpenRouter account if used
items.currently_have: DeepSeek read-only balance proof exists as live-credit-balance; OpenRouter read-only credits returned 401 User not found with the stored key.
items.proof_needed: DeepSeek monthly usage or invoice export, plus valid OpenRouter credit/billing read or export if any DeepSeek runs route through OpenRouter.
items.exact_input_needed: DeepSeek usage/invoice export for the current month; valid OpenRouter API key or dashboard export only if OpenRouter is used.
items.disallowed_workaround: Do not treat credit balance as monthly usage, and do not move model budget from OpenAI API or Codex OAuth/Pro without an approval artifact.

artifact_intake_template.human_confirmation: I confirm this artifact came from the named owner system and does not authorize live mutation or live spend movement.

acceptance_criteria: Artifact path points to a local file or output artifact that is not a secret file.
Artifact came from the named owner system, dashboard, invoice, billing export, or explicit no-spend confirmation.
Billing period overlaps the current reconciliation month.
Amount is a non-negative USD current-period value, or the item explicitly states no spend for the period.
Artifact does not authorize live sends, ads, provider jobs, payments, payouts, production mutations, hosted-session fulfillment, city activation, or Operational Launch Ready claims.
